decisions.rationale: Observation 'New York City Transit' matches the existing registry record entity_mta-nyct (entity_name: 'MTA New York City Transit', entity_type: 'agency'). The registry alias 'entity_nyct-2012-02-06-webster-cac' confirms this source is already associated. Base_record_id is the closest and correct match — no different target record needed.

Observation 'New York City Department of Transportation (NYC DOT)' matches the existing registry record entity_nyc-dot (entity_name: 'New York City Department of Transportation', entity_type: 'agency'). The registry alias 'entity_nyc-dot-2012-02-06-webster-cac' confirms this source is already associated. Base_record_id is the closest and correct match — no different target record needed.
